customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high technical literacy. Chris is an existing solar owner who has already evaluated and rejected Powerwall on architectural grounds. He is shopping deliberately, not impulsively. His primary concern is product fit — he wants non-brand-specific, expandable battery storage — not price or legitimacy.
unresolved_concerns: Whether Ion's battery catalog includes non-Powerwall options (EG4 or equivalent 48V systems). Bucky told Chris Ion has 'tons of batteries' — this claim is unverified against Ion's known Powerwall-only catalog per the 2026-05-15 Kenny confirmation. Manager must verify current catalog before the 2PM sit.
Whether Chris's existing solar system is operational. The orphaned flow system-working check (a hard DQ gate per dq_rules) was never asked. Closer should confirm system status at the top of the call.
sensitive_topics_raised: Non-Powerwall battery preference — Chris explicitly rejected Powerwall and named EG4 as his preferred alternative. If Ion cannot serve this need, the closer must address it directly rather than pivoting to Powerwall as a substitute without acknowledgment.
exact_promises_rep_made: Phone call tomorrow at 2PM with a specialist, focused on battery storage options.
Text reminder sent after the call.
'We have tons of batteries. We have, like, multiple.' — Bucky affirmed Ion carries multiple battery options including (by implication) non-Powerwall alternatives.
